'''''Togri''''' was a [[MB-C1 medium transport]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]]. Togri was part of the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial II-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'''s]] [[Corrupter repair convoy|vital resupply convoy]] lead by the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B Frigate]] [[Monitor (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Monitor'']] to the Corrupter in the [[Mev system/Legends|Mev system]]. Togri's cargo was 'machinery'. The ship was then attacked by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] raiders and was destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
